title: Senior Account Executive
description: Lead client communication, coordinate campaign timelines, and keep project delivery on track across all accounts.
responsibilities: Manage day-to-day client relationships and communications
Coordinate internal teams across creative, strategy, and production
Track campaign timelines and ensure on-time delivery
Prepare status reports, proposals, and meeting materials
Identify growth opportunities within existing accounts
requirements: 2+ years experience in account management, PR, or integrated marketing
Strong communication and project management skills
Fluent in Vietnamese with working proficiency in English
Comfortable working in a fast-paced agency environment

title: Creative Designer (2D/3D)
description: Design event key visuals, stage mockups, and branded touchpoints across digital and physical spaces.
responsibilities: Create event key visuals and brand identity assets
Design stage setups, booth mockups, and environmental graphics
Develop motion graphics and 3D visualisations for client presentations
Collaborate with strategy teams to translate concepts into executions
requirements: Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite; Blender or similar 3D tools is a plus
Strong portfolio demonstrating event and brand design work
Sharp eye for detail and aesthetic consistency
Able to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines

title: Event Operations Intern
description: Support onsite logistics, supplier coordination, and production setup for live brand activations.
responsibilities: Assist with event logistics planning and supplier coordination
Support production setup and breakdown for live events
Track vendor deliverables and maintain event run-of-show documents
Provide onsite support and troubleshooting during event execution
requirements: Currently enrolled in Marketing, Events Management, or a related field
Proactive attitude with strong organisational skills
Comfortable working in dynamic, fast-moving environments
Basic proficiency in MS Office or Google Workspace
